teachingPoint: T187 QuotaManager is an INLINE service — F426 does NOT exist. T187 is instantiated directly in the T173 constructor via new QuotaManager(config) and must NEVER be @Inject()-ed or resolved via any factory.
keywords: T187 QuotaManager inline instantiated constructor F426 does not exist never inject never factory recordUsage after query INLINE_SERVICE DI resolution failure
ironRules: T187 QuotaManager is an INLINE SERVICE — it has no factory ID. F426 does NOT exist.
T187 is instantiated directly in T173 QueryExecutionEngine constructor via new QuotaManager(config)
Never @Inject(T187) or use @Inject('F426') — F426 does not exist and would cause DI failure at runtime
quota.check() must run BEFORE warehouse read (T173 gate layer 1)
quotaManager.recordUsage() must be called AFTER successful query execution only
